title: How Jinx is built
text: bulk Jinx regular R package R/ exported functions grouped module — team management, chapters, directory, blog, announcements, reports, events, conferences, contributors, i18n, Slack, analytics, PR review. function reference lists everything group. Two things distinguish typical R package: Templates config live inst/. Issue-comment replies, onboarding checklists, command help, translations, team rules data files R functions read runtime. Editing template never requires code change. runs unattended. calls happen runner, someone’s session. what: Cloudflare Worker — the Slack / Airtable front door
title: How Jinx is built
text: worker https://jinx.rladies.workers.dev lives worker/src/ piece Jinx run GitHub infrastructure. exists Slack Airtable need low-latency HTTPS endpoint Actions provide. Five things happen : OAuth token storage — slack-oauth.js runs install flow stashes per-workspace bot tokens Cloudflare KV (SLACK_TOKENS). allowlist check (organisers + community workspaces ) rejects install outside RLadies+. Signature verification — every Slack-side POST runs slack_signature_verify() slack-api.js business logic. Slash commands mentions — slash-command.js slack-events.js translate Slack payloads repository_dispatch events fire matching bot-* workflow, post workflow’s reply back via response_url. Slack sees normal slash-command response; GitHub sees normal workflow run. RAG answers — rag.js handles @Jinx-mention questions querying Cloudflare Vectorize index RLadies+ Guide website, using Workers AI answer. path stays entirely inside worker — GitHub round-trip. Airtable invite approval — airtable-invite.js receives webhook public invite form posts Block Kit cards organisers’ channel; slack-interact handles Approve / Deny / Mark-sent button clicks. worker deployed infra-deploy-worker.yml configured Wrangler secrets KV bindings, documented .github/AGENTS.md.

title: RAG indexer
text: indexer runs week (demand) GitHub Actions workflow. run : Reads list sources inst/config/rag-sources.yml. source, calls matching gather_<type>() function produce list text chunks. Embeds chunks batches Cloudflare Workers AI (@cf/baai/bge-base-en-v1.5). Upserts vectors rladies-content Cloudflare Vectorize index. Vectors keyed sha256("{repo}|{path}|{chunk_idx}")[1:32]. Re-running indexer idempotent — content produces IDs, existing vectors updated place.

title: RAG indexer
text: chunking, embedding, upsert logic live R/rag-chunk.R, R/rag-embed.R, R/rag-index.R. dispatcher gather_rag_source() finds gather_<type>(src) (dashes type become underscores function name).
code: inst/config/rag-sources.yml         │         ▼    load_rag_sources()         │         ▼   rag_index_build()         │         ├─► gather_rag_source(src)   ── dispatched per `type` ──►  gather_<type>(src)         │                                                                │         │                                                                ▼         │                                                         chunk_markdown()         │                                                                │         ▼                                                                ▼   cloudflare_embed()  ◄── batch of 50 ───────────  list of chunk records         │         ▼   cloudflare_vectorize_upsert()         │         ▼    rladies-content (Cloudflare Vectorize)

title: RAG indexer
text: source ends R/rag-source-<type>.R.

title: RAG indexer
text: Adding source two files one YAML entry. Step 1. Decide type — kebab-case identifier discourse-forum. maps directly function name gather_discourse_forum(). Step 2. Create R/rag-source-discourse-forum.R export (@keywords internal fine) function takes source spec returns list chunk records: chunk record needs fields: text — content embed (≥ 200 chars trimming). heading — section heading within page (may empty). title — page title. repo / path — used part vector ID metadata. pair must stable across runs re-indexing updates existing vector instead orphaning . url — Slack bot link answer. date / lastmod — unix seconds. Used apply staleness factor query time. 0 unknown. chunk_idx — zero-based index within document (sources emit one chunk per item use 0L; sources split long documents use chunk_markdown() assign sequential indices). source produces markdown documents, use chunk_markdown() chunk sizes stay consistent across index: Step 3. Add YAML entry inst/config/rag-sources.yml: Anything put YAML passed gather function src argument. source_type shows retrieved chunk’s metadata — indexer sets every chunk function returns, don’t need set . Step 4. Add tests. Pure formatting/parsing helpers go tests/testthat/test-rag-sources.R; HTTP-touching helpers mocked local_mocked_responses() (put library(httr2) top test file don’t need httr2:: prefix — see test-rag-embed.R pattern). ’s whole contributor surface. don’t touch orchestrator, dispatcher, embed/upsert logic.
code: gather_discourse_forum <- function(src) {   # ... fetch and process ...   list(     list(       text = "the chunk text — at least 200 chars after trimming",       heading = "thread title or section heading",       title = "page title",       repo = src$repo,       path = "thread/1234",       url = "https://forum.example.com/t/1234",       date = 1700000000L,       lastmod = 1700000000L,       chunk_idx = 0L     )   ) } chunks <- chunk_markdown(   markdown_text,   meta = list(     repo = src$repo,     path = "/some/path",     url = "https://example.com/some/path",     fallback_title = "Page title"   ) ) for (i in seq_along(chunks)) {   chunks[[i]]$chunk_idx <- i - 1L } - type: discourse-forum   source_type: forum   repo: example/forum   base_url: https://forum.example.com

text: Jinx ships handful reusable GitHub Actions workflows RLadies+ repo can adopt lines YAML. ’re .github/workflows/ start reusable-:

title: RLadies+ GitHub Organisation Management
text: Every reusable runs inside ghcr.io/rladies/jinx-bot container. runner pull image, calling workflow must grant job packages: read. simplest pattern workflow-level block: Without , ’ll see Error response daemon: denied docker pull step job fails welcome/thank/checklist runs. JINX_APP_ID JINX_PRIVATE_KEY configured org-level secrets rladies, repo org inherits automatically — per-repo configuration needed secrets . jinx GitHub App need installed calling repo, true org-wide today. minimal caller looks like:
code: permissions:   contents: read   packages: read name: Hello on PR or Issue  on:   pull_request:     types: [opened, closed]   issues:     types: [opened]  permissions:   contents: read   packages: read  jobs:   welcome:     if: github.event.action == 'opened'     uses: rladies/jinx/.github/workflows/reusable-welcome-contributor.yml@main     secrets:       JINX_APP_ID: ${{ secrets.JINX_APP_ID }}       JINX_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.JINX_PRIVATE_KEY }}    thank:     if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.action == 'closed' && github.event.pull_request.merged == true     uses: rladies/jinx/.github/workflows/reusable-thank-contributor.yml@main     secrets:       JINX_APP_ID: ${{ secrets.JINX_APP_ID }}       JINX_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.JINX_PRIVATE_KEY }}

title: jinx (development version)
text: awesome-rladies-creations packages feed 41 entries pkdown_url /repo_url parse empty JSON objects ({}) rather strings null. scheduled indexer crashed mid-run 2026-05-24 missing value TRUE/FALSE needed one reached nzchar(). custom %% operator downstream nzchar() checks now go new is_blank() helper treats NULL, zero-length vectors lists, NA, empty string uniformly “missing”. Regression tests pin empty-list NA cases. parse_unix_date() longer errors handed empty list non-character / non-numeric value; returns NULL, matching behaviour NULL "".

title: jinx 0.1.1
text: content indexer feeds Slack bot’s Cloudflare Vectorize store moved standalone Node indexer/ directory R package. 8 sources (hugo-site, github-org, pkgdown-llms, github-files, github-remote-files, events-json, awesome-creations, youtube-channel) now configured inst/config/rag-sources.yml implemented gather_<type>() functions R/rag-source-*.R. Adding new source one new R file plus YAML entry — see RAG indexer article. Vector IDs remain sha256("{repo}|{path}|{chunk_idx}")[1:32], R re-index updates existing rladies-content index place rather orphaning vectors. Hugo pages now extracted rvest + rmarkdown::pandoc_convert() (html → gfm-raw_html) instead cheerio + turndown. Pandoc emits proper GFM pipe tables turndown produced flat key/value text; output differs cosmetically (- vs * bullets). bot-index-content.yml now uses r-lib/actions/setup-r calls jinx::rag_index_build(). Hugo page fetches parallelised via httr2::req_perform_parallel (max_active = 8) match throughput JS pool indexer replaced. gather_rag_source() now hard-errors unknown source type YAML typo inst/config/rag-sources.yml aborts run rather silently skipping source weekly cron. Cloudflare API calls (embed, upsert, account-id discovery) inherit req_retry(max_tries = 3) policy via base cloudflare_request() helper, transient 5xx longer kills whole indexer. Fixed NA propagation extract_hugo_page() embed literal string "NA" chunk text Hugo page missing <title> <meta name="description"> tag.

title: jinx 0.1.1
text: reranker now applies 1.6× boost events chunks whose date future, handful upcoming events index float top top-5 instead drowned much larger pool past events kept 365-day trailing window. questions look like event queries (“upcoming events”, “’s next meetup”, “workshops soon?”, etc.), retriever now runs second targeted query index using fixed event-shaped prompt merges resulting events chunks candidate pool reranking. rescues upcoming events whose cosine similarity user’s casual phrasing otherwise left outside top-20. fixed event-shaped prompt’s embedding memoised KV rag:event_embedding:v1 second retrieval costs one extra vector query (second embed call) first warm-. Jinx system prompt now tells model use “:” / “Status:” lines event chunks, prefer Status: upcoming user asks future events, honestly upcoming events retrieved sources rather substituting past one.

title: jinx 0.1.1
text: /jinx slash commands community workspace previously failed channel_not_found GHA workflow used organisers’ bot token post community channel ID. worker now forwards team_id dispatch payload, workflow verifies SLACK_ORGANIZER_TEAM_ID / SLACK_COMMUNITY_TEAM_ID repo vars, reply step posts via workspace-agnostic response_url instead chat.postMessage.

title: jinx 0.1.1
text: gh_welcome_contributor() gh_greet_contributor() gained extra_message argument. string appended standard welcome jinx signature, callers can add project-specific reminder (e.g. “remember add .zenodo.json”) without forking function. reusable-welcome-contributor.yml now accepts matching extra_message workflow input forwards via environment variable (string interpolation R source, input safe set markdown). reusable also fires pull_request_target opens, callers need welcome fork-PR authors can switch trigger without losing welcome step.

title: jinx 0.1.1
text: contributor_welcome() → gh_welcome_contributor() contributor_thank() → gh_thank_contributor() contributor_greet() → gh_greet_contributor() blog_post_checklist() → gh_post_checklist() (also generalised: message now opens “Thank submitting post” applies blog news content equally; path filter caller workflow already covers ). chapter_get_language() → i18n_get_chapter_language() (always lived R/i18n.R, now follows <module>_<verb>_* pattern). Internal helpers directory_validation_row() directory_empty_validation_df() R/i18n-validate.R renamed i18n_validation_row() / i18n_empty_validation_df() (validate translations, directory entries). Reusable workflows: reusable-website-blog-checklist.yml → reusable-post-checklist.yml. reusable-welcome-contributor.yml reusable-thank-contributor.yml updated call new names.

title: jinx 0.1.0
text: Initial release. jinx automates organisational workflows RLadies+ GitHub org: chapter onboarding health, directory validation, blog announcement publishing, PR review, Airtable sync, Slack, analytics, events, CFP coordination, i18n. Exported functions follow <module>_<verb>[_<object>] schema group cleanly autocomplete. Short prefixes used established acronyms (cmd_, gt_, li_, cfp_, gha_, i18n_). Triggered via /jinx issue comments (cmd_parse() / cmd_execute()) 24 GitHub Actions workflows. Ships pkgdown site, Getting Started Workflow Reference vignettes, starter translations Spanish, Portuguese, French.
